name: Hezbollah
summary: Iran's proxy in Lebanon. Entered war Mar 2 in response to Khamenei killing. Launched 200+ rockets/day at Israel. Israel responding with ground incursion into southern Lebanon and Beirut strikes. ~1,000 Lebanese killed, 1M+ displaced.

signals.content: Hezbollah launched strikes on Israel in response to Khamenei's killing. ~200 rockets in single day. Drones targeted Ramat David airbase in northern Israel.
Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon in response. Separate from Iran air campaign. Expected to last several weeks.
Nearly 1,000 dead in Lebanon from 2 weeks of fighting. 1M+ displaced (~25% of country). Lebanese PM demanded Hezbollah surrender weapons.

edges.context: Iran's primary proxy. Entered war to avenge Khamenei. Receives strategic direction, weapons, funding from Iran.
Direct combat. Rockets at northern Israel. Israel ground operations in southern Lebanon and strikes on Beirut.
Based in Lebanon. Operations are devastating Lebanon — 1M displaced, 1,000 dead. Lebanese government demanding disarmament.
